articles.title: FDA Blocks Promising Melanoma Drug as Makary Inherits Agency Chaos
articles.summary: FDA bureaucrats blocked a genetically engineered melanoma treatment that shrank tumors in a third of clinical trial patients. The suppression happened under previous leadership, exposing the agency's pattern of burying breakthrough therapies that threaten established cancer treatment protocols.

articles.title: 25-Year Government Fraud Buried Hyperbaric Therapy for Veterans

articles.title: FDA Flags Cancer Company for False Claims After $2B Market Cap Wipeout
